title: Residential Solar
longDescription: Empower your home with independent, renewable energy. We design and install high-efficiency systems optimized for roof layouts, ensuring maximum yield to offset utility costs.

title: Commercial & Industrial
longDescription: Engineered for manufacturing and enterprise facilities with predictable operating costs, reliable output, and lower long-term energy exposure.

title: Net Metering Services
longDescription: We manage NEPRA/LESCO compliance, NOC processing, and bi-directional meter readiness, enabling clean export of surplus energy to the grid.

title: Maintenance & Cleaning
shortDescription: Keep production and efficiency at peak.
longDescription: Scheduled cleaning, performance monitoring, and preventive service to protect solar assets and sustain maximum output across seasons.
